action.name: Examine host plush.
action.args: @! Looks like SOMEONE needs to stop playing games for girls.

action.name: Examine UNIREAL AIR.
action.args: @! It's almost impossible to cross the room without tripping over this goddamn thing. The mess in here is unireal. I mean unreal.

action.name: Examine pile of shitty horns.
action.args: @! Look at this shit all over the floor. Barely been here a couple hours and this dude turns the lab into his own personal clown sty.

action.name: Finish responding to Kanaya in memo.
action.args: @! /0x626262 CURRENT carcinoGeneticist [CCG] /0x000000 RIGHT NOW responded to memo.
